Is team eligible for Brokers Cup?
In order for team to be eligible for Brokers Cup Award, all 4 golfers must meet all 3 qualifications:

1. Be an active REALTOR®

2. Belong to the same brokerage

3. Broker must be a member of B.E.R.

Name: Conditions Of Membership
Description:
AFFILIATE MEMBERSHIP PLEDGE 

 

For adequate value received and in consideration of being an affiliate member in the Association, I irrevocably waive and release any claim or right of action that I may have or acquire against the Association or any of its officers, directors, or members for any act performed in connection with the business of the Association and particularly, as to the acts of the Association or any of its officers, directors or members taken in approving or not approving, advancing, suspending, expelling or otherwise disciplining me as an applicant or member of the Association. 

 

I CERTIFY THAT I HAVE READ THE ABOVE AND THAT ALL INFORMAITON FURNISHED BY ME ON THIS APPLICATION IS TRUE AND CORRECT.  I UNDERSTAND AND AGREE THAT FAILURE TO PROVIDE COMPLETE AND ACCURATE INFORMATION AS REQUESTED, OR ANY MISSTATEMENT OF FACT, SHALL BE GROUNDS FOR THE IMMEDIATE REVOCATION OF MY MEMBERSHIP. 


 

CONDITIONS 

 

We hereby apply for Affiliate Membership in the BONITA SPRINGS-ESTERO REALTORS®, INC. with the understanding that this class of membership is only available to those not actively involved in the real estate business.  This application is subject to review and approval by the Board of Directors.  Should our application not be approved, our fees will be refunded, minus a prorated amount equal to the number of days Bonita Springs – Estero Realtors has provided membership privileges.  If our application is approved, we agree as a condition of membership to abide by the rules governing this class of membership.  Dues are established annually by the Board and are subject to change.  To renew our membership, we agree to pay the appropriate annual dues on or before January 1st of each year.

Name: Acknowledgement to Policy
Description: Bonita Springs-Estero REALTORS holds the safety of its members, staff, guests, and all parties at an event as a high priority.  This event is a poker run and will be held at multiple establishments which serve alcohol.  When attending this event it is highly encouraged that you have a designated driver if you choose to consume alcoholic beverages or use a rideshare program such as Uber or Lyft.  In the past, groups rented a party bus.  B.E.R. is not liable for your transportation to and from locations.

Description: Not required but nice to have on file

Name: Committee Interest
Description:
Events - The purpose of the Events Committee is to increase the profitability of events for charity and create marketing opportunities for Affiliate members to promote their services to the REALTOR members and the general public, provide feedback for member benefits, aid in recognition and awards programs.

Global Diversity - The purpose of the Global Diversity Committee is to provide member diversity programs, cultivate a culture of equity and inclusion, champion the goal of increasing global business education to foster business growth and opportunity, educate members and consumers on the importance of fair housing laws.

Government Affair/RPAC - The purpose of the Government Affairs Committee (GAC) is to develop sources of financial support from Board members and Board activities to be used to support those candidates for public office at the local, state, and national levels who best support the free enterprise system, private property ownership, and real estate industry positions, and to support issues as identified by the Association to be of importance to the REALTORS® goals.

Grievance/Professional Standards - The purpose of the Grievance Committee is to review complaints referred to it by the Executive Officer or professional standards administrator and determine if the complaint has sufficient substance and merit to warrant an ethics hearing or an arbitration hearing.

Media (Brokers ONLY) - The purpose of the Media Committee is to review market statistics and trends.  This data is then to be conveyed to the consumer in the form of a press release to highlight the market area of Bonita Springs & Estero.  In addition, this press release will be distributed to association members.

MLS - The purpose is to vet products and services considered as external links of the MLS.  To review the functionality of the Corelogic Matrix platform and make recommendations for possible changes.  

Professional Development - The purpose of the Professional Development Committee is to develop and administer a well-balanced program of education while trying to serve the educational needs of the membership through various programs and recommendations.

Professional Standards - The Professional Standards Committee is the committee of the Board charged with the responsibility for enforcement of the Code of Ethics through the conduct of ethics and arbitration hearings. Training required and will be offered in January 2023.

Realtor Review - The purpose is to help provide valuable content for the quarterly publication and assist with review and edits.

Realtor Safety - The purpose is to create safety programs and systems that will help to educate the Realtor member on the importance of Realtor safety.  

YPN - The YPN Committee is a network of up-and-coming REALTORS® and Affiliates involved with B.E.R. and the real estate industry for the purpose of giving back to the community and growing professionally.

Leadership Development - Assists with nominations, awards, strategic planning, and Leadership Academy.  Must be a graduate of the Leadership Academy or have served on the board.
